goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 09:30' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'hamilton lodge'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 09:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get price and train ID
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called hamilton lodge
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
